name: EdwDmProvDirDmNtwkExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT DISTINCT A.SRC_SYS_CD, B.NTWK_ID, B.NTWK_DIR_CD, B.NTWK_DIR_NM, B.NTWK_NM, B.NTWK_SH_NM, B.NTWK_TYP_CD, B.NTWK_TYP_NM, B.USER_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_NTWK_D A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.NTWK_D B WHERE A.NTWK_ID = B.NTWK_ID AND B.NTWK_DIR_CD IN ('ALLDIR','WEBDIR') AND A.PROV_NTWK_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_final AS (SELECT cte_main.NTWK_ID, cte_main.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_main.NTWK_DIR_CD, cte_main.NTWK_DIR_NM, cte_main.NTWK_NM, cte_main.NTWK_SH_NM, cte_main.NTWK_TYP_CD, cte_main.NTWK_TYP_NM, CASE WHEN cte_main.NTWK_SH_NM = 'DENP' THEN 'DENTPC' ELSE cte_main.NTWK_SH_NM END AS PROD_SH_NM, cte_main.USER_ID, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdtDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte_main) SELECT * FROM cte_final

PROCESSING:   Retrieves the data from EDW PROV_NTWK_D and NTWK_D table and loads into the Web Provider Directory database
